name: manapro
description: Manapro - Project Management for UMKM Indonesia

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:web
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:web
